sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21464" key="galaktou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰλακτ-οῦχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n21464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sucking milk</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
